hero.subtitle: Double-tap your iPhone's back to translate foreign text on screen in 2 seconds. No app switching, no copy-paste — translations overlay right on the original interface.

steps.title: Tap the back
steps.desc: Double-tap the back of your iPhone to trigger a screenshot via iOS Shortcuts. Works the same whether you're gaming, shopping, or browsing social media.

steps.title: AI translates
steps.desc: On-device OCR accurately detects all text on screen. The DeepL engine translates everything into your target language — the whole process takes about 2 seconds.

steps.title: Read & ask
steps.desc: Translations overlay the original text while preserving the interface layout. Confused about something? Ask the AI for context, cultural notes, or grammar explanations.

items.title: Immersive translation overlay
items.desc: Translations are placed precisely over original text, preserving the interface layout perfectly. This isn't simple text replacement — Translay analyzes each line's position and size to present translations in the most natural way. It feels less like a translation tool and more like the content was written in your language all along.

items.title: 15+ languages supported
items.desc: Freely translate between Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and more. Powered by the DeepL engine — consistently top-rated in professional translation benchmarks. Whether it's a Japanese game UI, a Korean shopping page, or French news, Translay handles it all.

items.title: AI deep questions
items.desc: Translation is just the beginning. When you encounter something confusing, ask the AI directly. It can explain cultural context, analyze sentence structure, offer synonyms, and even decode slang or internet lingo. Like having a multilingual tutor in your pocket.

items.title: Privacy first
items.desc: OCR text recognition runs entirely on-device — your screenshots never leave your phone. Translation requests are encrypted end-to-end, and we store nothing. Your screen content remains yours and yours alone.

items.title: Home overview
items.desc: Clean, intuitive home screen — start translating with one tap

items.title: Shortcut trigger
items.desc: Use iOS Shortcuts — double-tap your back to screenshot and translate

items.title: Translation history
items.desc: All translations saved automatically for easy lookup later

items.title: Translation detail
items.desc: Side-by-side original and translation, with line-by-line analysis

items.title: AI deep chat
items.desc: Context-aware AI conversations based on your translated content

items.title: Flexible settings
items.desc: Customize translation language, AI model, and more

statement.sub: Users should feel like they're using magic, not software.

support_page.title: Support Center
support_page.setup_intro: Get started with Translay in just 3 minutes.
setup_steps: Download Translay from the App Store
Open Translay and select your target language
Go to iPhone Settings → Accessibility → Touch → Back Tap
Set "Double Tap" to the Translay shortcut
In any app, double-tap the back of your iPhone to translate!
support_page.preview_desc: Once set up, double-tap your phone's back in any app to see translations overlaid instantly:

faqs.a: Translay uses the DeepL translation engine, one of the highest-rated engines in professional benchmarks. If specialized terms aren't translating well, try the AI follow-up feature — the AI uses context to provide more precise explanations.
Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, and 15+ mainstream languages with more being added continuously.
The free version provides 5 translations and 5 AI questions per day. Quotas reset automatically at midnight. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited use.

Please check step by step: 1) Confirm your network connection; 2) Go to Settings → Accessibility → Touch → Back Tap to verify the shortcut is set correctly; 3) Try reopening the Translay app. If the issue persists, please contact our support team.

OCR text recognition runs entirely on-device — screenshots are never uploaded to any server. Translation requests use encrypted transmission, and we store no translation content. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
Go to iPhone Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions to manage or cancel your Translay Pro subscription. After cancellation, Pro features remain available until the end of the current billing period.

support_page.contact_desc: For other questions, reach out via email. We typically respond within 24 hours:
